message:
fix: improve JSON parsing in integration tests

- TestRobotTailWithNonexistentSession: Extract JSON portion correctly
  when warnings precede the JSON in output (use jsonStart pattern)
- TestRobotMailHandlerDispatch: Check for non-empty map instead of
  nil check (unmarshaling JSON object never returns nil map)
